tasks.label: Install Agents
tasks.detail: Install automotive copilot agents to .github/copilot directory

tasks.label: Install Agents (Dry Run)
tasks.detail: Preview installation without making changes

tasks.label: Check Installation Status
tasks.detail: Show current installation status and agent count

tasks.label: Uninstall Agents
tasks.detail: Remove automotive copilot agents from .github/copilot directory

tasks.label: Validate Installation
tasks.detail: Validate installation integrity and completeness

tasks.label: Validate Installation (Verbose)
tasks.detail: Validate installation with detailed agent/skill/knowledge listing

tasks.label: Validate Installation (JSON Output)
tasks.detail: Export validation results to JSON for CI/CD integration

tasks.label: Validate Installation (JUnit XML)
tasks.detail: Export validation results to JUnit XML for CI/CD pipelines

tasks.label: ADAS: Run Perception Pipeline Test
tasks.command: echo 'Perception pipeline test - configure with your simulation environment'
tasks.detail: Test sensor fusion pipeline (EKF/UKF) with recorded scenarios

tasks.label: ADAS: Validate Sensor Calibration
tasks.command: echo 'Sensor calibration validation - configure with your calibration tools'
tasks.detail: Validate camera-radar-lidar extrinsic calibration

tasks.label: ADAS: SOTIF Scenario Testing
tasks.command: echo 'SOTIF testing - configure with CARLA or VTD simulation'
tasks.detail: Test triggering conditions (rain, fog, sun glare, tunnel transitions)

tasks.label: AUTOSAR: Validate ARXML Configuration
tasks.command: echo 'ARXML validation - configure with DaVinci Configurator or EB tresos'
tasks.detail: Validate AUTOSAR system description and BSW configuration

tasks.label: AUTOSAR: Generate RTE Code
tasks.command: echo 'RTE generation - configure with your AUTOSAR toolchain'
tasks.detail: Generate Runtime Environment code from system description

tasks.label: AUTOSAR: Check BSW Module Consistency
tasks.command: echo 'BSW consistency check - configure with vector tools'
tasks.detail: Verify Basic Software module configuration consistency

tasks.label: Diagnostics: UDS Service Scan
tasks.command: echo 'UDS scan - configure with vector canoe or peak tools'
tasks.detail: Scan available UDS services (0x10, 0x11, 0x22, 0x27, 0x2E, 0x31)

tasks.label: Diagnostics: Read Active DTCs
tasks.command: echo 'DTC read - configure with UDS 0x19 service'
tasks.detail: Read active and stored diagnostic trouble codes

tasks.label: Diagnostics: OBD Live Data Stream
tasks.command: echo 'OBD streaming - configure with ISO 15031-5 PID requests'
tasks.detail: Stream live OBD data (RPM, speed, load, temperature, fuel trim)

tasks.label: Diagnostics: Security Access Test
tasks.command: echo 'Security access - configure with UDS 0x27 seed-key'
tasks.detail: Test UDS security access level 1-6 with seed-key algorithm

tasks.label: BMS: Run Battery Simulation
tasks.command: echo 'Battery simulation - configure with your cell model'
tasks.detail: Simulate battery pack behavior (SOC, SOH, thermal, aging)

tasks.label: BMS: Thermal Profile Analysis
tasks.command: echo 'Thermal analysis - configure with your thermal model'
tasks.detail: Analyze cell temperature distribution and cooling performance

tasks.label: BMS: SOH Estimation Validation
tasks.command: echo 'SOH validation - configure with degradation model'
tasks.detail: Validate state-of-health estimation algorithms

tasks.label: BMS: Cell Balancing Test
tasks.command: echo 'Cell balancing test - configure with balancing strategy'
tasks.detail: Test passive/active cell balancing algorithms

tasks.label: Powertrain: Engine Mapping Validation
tasks.command: echo 'Engine mapping - configure with ECU calibration tools'
tasks.detail: Validate air-fuel ratio, ignition timing, boost pressure maps

tasks.label: Powertrain: Transmission Shift Calibration
tasks.command: echo 'Transmission calibration - configure with TCM tools'
tasks.detail: Calibrate shift points, shift quality, torque converter lockup

tasks.label: Chassis: Brake Balance Analysis
tasks.command: echo 'Brake balance - configure with vehicle dynamics model'
tasks.detail: Analyze front-rear brake distribution under various conditions

tasks.label: Chassis: Suspension Tuning
tasks.command: echo 'Suspension tuning - configure with damper/spring model'
tasks.detail: Tune damper coefficients, spring rates, anti-roll bars

tasks.label: Safety: Run FMEA Analysis
tasks.command: echo 'FMEA analysis - configure with your FMEA tool (APIS, IQS)
tasks.detail: Perform Failure Mode and Effects Analysis per ISO 26262

tasks.label: Safety: Run FTA Analysis
tasks.command: echo 'FTA analysis - configure with fault tree tool'
tasks.detail: Perform Fault Tree Analysis for top-level hazards

tasks.label: Safety: Verify ASIL Decomposition
tasks.command: echo 'ASIL decomposition - review independence measures'
tasks.detail: Verify ASIL decomposition independence and DFA results

tasks.label: Security: Run TARA Analysis
tasks.command: echo 'TARA analysis - configure with threat modeling tool'
tasks.detail: Perform Threat Analysis and Risk Assessment per ISO 21434

tasks.label: Security: Penetration Test Scan
tasks.command: echo 'Penetration test - configure with authorized security tools'
tasks.detail: Run authorized penetration testing on vehicle interfaces

tasks.label: Security: Verify Secure Boot Chain
tasks.command: echo 'Secure boot verification - check HSM configuration'
tasks.detail: Verify secure boot chain integrity and signature validation

tasks.label: Validation: Run Unit Test Suite
tasks.command: ctest --output-on-failure
tasks.detail: Run CTest unit test suite with failure output

tasks.label: Validation: Run Integration Tests
tasks.command: ctest -L integration --output-on-failure
tasks.detail: Run integration test suite (labeled 'integration')

tasks.label: Validation: Generate Coverage Report
tasks.command: gcovr --xml-pretty -o coverage.xml --html-details coverage/index.html
tasks.detail: Generate code coverage report with gcovr

tasks.label: Validation: MISRA C:2012 Check
tasks.command: echo 'MISRA check - configure with cppcheck, Polyspace, or QAC'
tasks.detail: Run MISRA C:2012 static analysis

tasks.label: Documentation: Generate Agent Catalog
tasks.command: python scripts/generate-agent-catalog.py
tasks.detail: Generate documentation/AGENT-CATALOG.md from agent files

tasks.label: Documentation: Build All Docs
tasks.command: mkdocs build
tasks.detail: Build full documentation site with MkDocs
